name: Character.AI
what_it_does: Platform for creating and interacting with AI characters with distinct personas, with embedding via an unofficial API only — no official public API exists.
use_cases: Consumer-facing roleplay and persona-based entertainment applications
Interactive storytelling where AI characters maintain consistent persona
Educational simulations using historical or fictional character personas
Prototyping conversational AI with persona constraints for UX research
Entertainment chatbot experiences where character consistency matters more than reliability
not_for: Production agent workflows requiring a stable, documented API contract
Any use case requiring guaranteed uptime, rate limit transparency, or terms-of-service clarity
best_when: Best when building consumer entertainment apps where unofficial API instability is acceptable and character persona fidelity is the primary requirement.
avoid_when: Avoid for any production or agent use case — there is no official API, unofficial wrappers break without notice, and ToS prohibits automated access.

auth.notes: No official API auth. Unofficial clients reverse-engineer session cookies. Google/Apple OAuth used for web login only.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free to use with rate limits; Character.AI+ removes rate limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Character.AI+ at $9.99/month for priority access and faster responses
pricing.notes: No programmatic API pricing exists. Subscription is for the consumer product only.

performance.rate_limits: Unofficial access rate limits are unknown and enforced unpredictably

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No official error documentation. Unofficial wrappers surface raw HTTP errors without meaningful context.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No API contract guarantees; behavior of unofficial access is undefined.
known_agent_gotchas: No official public API — any programmatic access violates Terms of Service
Unofficial Python clients (PyCAI, etc.) break frequently when Character.AI changes their internal API
Account bans may result from automated access detected by platform
No rate limit transparency; requests may be silently throttled or dropped

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced on web. No security posture applicable to programmatic access since there is no official API. ToS violation risk is significant.
